mapper.select: select p.id, p.user_uuid as userUuid, u.nickname, p.title, p.content, p.visibility as visibility, p.like_count as likeCount, case when pl.id is not null then true else false end as likedByMe, p.created_at as createdAt from post p left join user as u on u.uuid = p.user_uuid left join post_like as pl on pl.post_id = p.id and pl.user_uuid = #{currUserUuid} and pl.status = 1 where p.id = #{postId} and p.status = 1 and p.visibility = 1 limit 1
select count(*) from post p where p.status = 1 and p.visibility = 1

select p.id, p.user_uuid as userUuid, u.nickname as nickname, p.title, p.visibility as visibility, p.like_count as likeCount, substring(p.content, 1, 20) as contentPreview, case when pl.id is not null then true else false end as likedByMe, p.created_at as createdAt from (select id, user_uuid, title, content, visibility, like_count, created_at from post where status = 1 and visibility = 1 order by created_at desc limit #{offset}, #{size} ) p left join user u on p.user_uuid = u.uuid left join post_like pl on pl.post_id = p.id and pl.user_uuid = #{currUserUuid} and pl.status = 1 order by p.created_at desc
